Part.Source:
&HojeData = serverdate() &DataHoraImpressao = 'DATA E HORA IMPRESSÃO: ' + trim(&HojeData.ToFormattedString()) + ' ' + ServerTime()
MB 4 MT 2
for Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod
If not FilFonNum.IsEmpty() &FilFonNum = FormataFONE.Udp(FilFonNum) EndIF
If not FilEml.IsEmpty() &FilEml = FilEml EndIF
If not FilRNTRC.Trim().IsEmpty() &FiLRNTRC = FilRNTRC EndIf &FilNfeCab = FilNfeCab Do Case Case FilNfeCab = '1' //DADOS FILIAL &FilImg146_50 = FilImg_LogNFeCmp
Case FilNfeCab = '2' //LOGOMARCA &FilImg146_50 = FilImg_LogNFeCmp
Case FilNfeCab = '3' //LOGO PARTE ESQUERDA &FilImg146_50 = FilImg_LogNfeEsq
Case FilNfeCab = '4' //LOGO PARTE SUPERIOR &FilImg146_50 = FilImg_LogNfeSup EndCase
LeituraXmlMDFe_web.Call(MDFeArqXml, &sdtMDFe)
Do Case Case MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Encerrado print Encerrado noSkip Case MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Cancelado print Cancelada noSkip
Case (MDFeSts <> Status_MDFe.Autorizado and MDFeSts <> Status_MDFe.Encerrado) or &sdtMDFe.Protocolo.IsEmpty() &Protocolo = 'SEM VALOR FISCAL' print SemValorFiscal noSkip
Case MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Autorizado if &sdtMDFe.tpAmb = '2' print SemValorFiscal noSkip EndIf EndCase
Exit EndFor
//DADOS DA NFE &Varchar = padL(trim(&sdtMDFe.nMDF), 9, '0') &Numero = substr(&Varchar, 1, 3) +'.' + substr(&Varchar, 4, 3) + '.' + substr(&Varchar, 7, 3)
&Varchar = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(&sdtMDFe.chvMDFe) &NFeChv = substr(&Varchar,1,4) + ' '+ substr(&Varchar,5,4) +' '+ substr(&Varchar,9,4) +' '+ substr(&Varchar,13,4) +' '+ substr(&Varchar,17,4) +' '+ substr(&Varchar,21,4) +' '+ substr(&Varchar,25,4) +' '+ substr(&Varchar,29,4) +' '+ substr(&Varchar,33,4) +' '+ substr(&Varchar,37,4) +' '+ substr(&Varchar,41,4)
&Serie = padL(trim(&sdtMDFe.serie), 3,'0') &Pagina = '1'
&MdfeOriUfeCod = &sdtMDFe.UFIni &MdfeDstUfeCod = &sdtMDFe.UFFim
if not &sdtMDFe.chvMDFe.IsEmpty()
//################### CODIGO BARRAS ############################################################################################################### &TipoCodigoBarras = TipoCodigoBarras.Code128C RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis + trim(&TipoCodigoBarras) + &sdtMDFe.chvMDFe.Trim() + '.jpg'
&File.Source = &Arquivo If not &File.Exists() ExeCodigoBarrasWinWeb_qrCode.Call(&sdtConfiguracoesPasta, &TipoCodigoBarras, trim(&sdtMDFe.chvMDFe), trim(&sdtMDFe.chvMDFe)) EndIF
If &File.Exists() &ImgCodigoBarras.FromURL(&Arquivo) EndIF
//################### QRCODE ############################################################################################################### &TipoCodigoBarras = TipoCodigoBarras.QrCode RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis + trim(&TipoCodigoBarras) + &sdtMDFe.chvMDFe.Trim() + '.png' &valqrCode = &sdtMDFe.qrCodMDFe.Trim() //&valqrCode = 'http://www.dfeportal.fazenda.pr.gov.br/dfe-portal/rest/servico/consultaNFCe?chNFe=41160509428476000100650010000000041000000041&nVersao=100&tpAmb=2 &File.Source = &Arquivo If not &File.Exists() and not &valqrCode.IsEmpty() ExeCodigoBarrasWinWeb_qrCode.Call(&sdtConfiguracoesPasta, &TipoCodigoBarras, &sdtMDFe.chvMDFe.Trim(), &valqrCode) EndIF
&File.Source = &Arquivo If &File.Exists() &QrCode.FromURL(&Arquivo) EndIF EndIf
&Protocolo = &sdtMDFe.Protocolo
&dhRecbto = substr(&sdtMDFe.dhRecbto ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtMDFe.dhRecbto,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtMDFe.dhRecbto,1,4) &dhRecbto += ' ' + Substr(&sdtMDFe.dhRecbto, 12,8)
&Protocolo += ' ' +&dhRecbto
//################# DADOS EMITENTE ############################################################################################################# &NfeFilcpfCnpj = &sdtMDFe.FilCpf If &NfeFilcpfCnpj.IsEmpty() &FilCnpj = 'CNPJ:' &NfeFilcpfCnpj = &sdtMDFe.FilCnpj Else &FilCnpj = 'CPF:' EndIF
ValidaCpfCnpj.call(&NfeFilcpfCnpj, &Valida, 'N')
&QtdLinhas = GxMlines(&sdtMDFe.FilRaz, 60) If &QtdLinhas > 1 &UmFilRaz = GxGetMLi(&sdtMDFe.FilRaz, 1, 60) Else &UmFilRaz = &sdtMDFe.FilRaz EndIF
&FilLog = &sdtMDFe.FilLog.Trim() + ', ' + &sdtMDFe.FilNro.Trim() If not &sdtMDFe.FilBai.IsEmpty() &FilLog += ' - ' + &sdtMDFe.FilBai.Trim() EndIF
If not &sdtMDFe.FilCpl.IsEmpty() &FilLog += ' - ' + &sdtMDFe.FilCpl.Trim() EndIf
&FilInfoEmp = &sdtMDFe.FilCidNom.Trim() + ' - ' + &sdtMDFe.FilCidUfeCod.Trim() + ' CEP: ' + formataCEP.Udp(&sdtMDFe.FilCep)
If not &sdtMDFe.FilInsEst.trim().IsEmpty() &FilInsEst = trim(&sdtMDFe.FilInsEst) EndIf
&FilInfoEmp2 = &FilCnpj +' '+&NfeFilcpfCnpj+' - IE: '+&FilInsEst+' - RNTRC: '+&FiLRNTRC
If not &FilFonNum.trim().IsEmpty() &DoisFilEml = 'Fone: '+ &sdtMDFe.FilFonNum.Trim() EndIf
Do case Case not &DoisFilEml.Trim().IsEmpty() and not &FilEml.Trim().IsEmpty() &DoisFilEml += ' E-mail: '+ &FilEml.Trim() Case &DoisFilEml.Trim().IsEmpty() and not &FilEml.Trim().IsEmpty() &DoisFilEml = 'E-mail: '+ &FilEml.Trim() EndCase
&dhEmi = substr(&sdtMDFe.dhEmi ,9,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtMDFe.dhEmi,6,2) +'/'+ Substr(&sdtMDFe.dhEmi,1,4) &MDfeDtaEms = CtoD(&dhEmi) &MDfeHorEms = Substr(&sdtMDFe.dhEmi, 12,8) &Modelo = trim(&sdtMDFe.mod)
&PesoTotal = val(&sdtMDFe.qCarga) &QtdCte = val(&sdtMDFe.qCTe) &QtdNFe = val(&sdtMDFe.qNFe)
do 'Emitente' //###############################################################################################################################################
If &sdtMDFe.cUnid = '01' &TituloPesoTotal = 'PESO TOTAL (KG)' Else &TituloPesoTotal = 'PESO TOTAL (TON)' EndIF
If &sdtMDFe.modalidade = '1' &ModaCarga = 'Modal Rodoviário de Carga' EndIF
Print MODO
For &sdtMDFeVeiculo in &sdtMDFe.Veiculo &VEiPla = FormataPLACA.Udp(&EmpCod, &sdtMDFeVeiculo.MDFeVeiPla) Do Case Case &UmVEiPla.IsEmpty() &UmVeiPla = &VeiPla &UmRNTRC = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RNTRC &UmRENAVAN = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RENAVAN Case &DoisVEiPla.IsEmpty() &DoisVEiPla = &VEiPla &DoiRNTRC = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RNTRC &DoisRENAVAN = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RENAVAN Case &TresVEiPla.IsEmpty() &TresVEiPla = &VEiPla &TresRNTRC = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RNTRC &TresRENAVAN = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RENAVAN Case &QuatroVEiPla.IsEmpty() &QuatroVEiPla = &VEiPla &QuatroRNTRC = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RNTRC &QuatroRENAVAN = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RENAVAN Case &CincoVEiPla.IsEmpty() &CincoVEiPla = &VEiPla &CincoRNTRC = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RNTRC &CincoRENAVAN = &sdtMDFeVeiculo.RENAVAN EndCase EndFor
for each Order EmpCod, FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfeSegCod, MdfeSegNom Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod
&MdfeSegNom = MdfeSegNom &MdfeSegCNPJ = MdfeSegCnpj
for each
do case case &MdfeSegNroAve1.IsEmpty() &MdfeSegNroAve1 = MdfeSegNroAve
case &MdfeSegNroAve2.IsEmpty() &MdfeSegNroAve2 = MdfeSegNroAve
case &MdfeSegNroAve3.IsEmpty() &MdfeSegNroAve3 = MdfeSegNroAve
case &MdfeSegNroAve4.IsEmpty() &MdfeSegNroAve4 = MdfeSegNroAve endcase endfor
exit endfor &MdfePedCnpjFor = '' &MdfePedResPag = '' &MdfePedNroCom = '' &MdfePedVlr = 0
For &sdtMDFePedagio in &sdtMDFe.valePedagio &MdfePedCnpjFor = &sdtMDFePedagio.CNPJForn validaCpfCnpj.Call(&MdfePedCnpjFor, &Cnpj_Erro, 'N') &MdfePedResPag = &sdtMDFePedagio.CNPJPg validaCpfCnpj.Call(&MdfePedResPag, &Cnpj_Erro, 'N') &MdfePedNroCom = &sdtMDFePedagio.nCompra &MdfePedVlr = val(&sdtMDFePedagio.vValePed) EndFor
print Veiculos NoSkip
&Count = 10 For &sdtMDFeMotorista in &sdtMDFe.Motorista &Count -= 1 &MDFeMotCpf = &sdtMDFeMotorista.MDFeMotCpf if not &MDFeMotCpf.IsEmpty() ValidaCpfCnpj.Call(&MDFeMotCpf, &Er, 'S') EndIF
&MDFeMotNom = &sdtMDFeMotorista.MDFeMotNom
print Motorista EndFor
&MDFeMotCpf = '' &MDFeMotNom = '' Do while &Count > 0 print Motorista &Count -= 1 EndDO
&ObsCiot = '' For &sdtMDFeCiot in &sdtMDFe.Ciot If not &ObsCiot.Trim().IsEmpty() &ObsCiot += ' - ' EndIf
&ObsCiot += &sdtMDFeCiot.CIOT
EndFor
&LinhaUmCiot = gxGetMLi(&ObsCiot, 1, 130) &LinhaDoisCiot = gxGetMLi(&ObsCiot, 2, 130)
Print Ciot
print COmposicaoCarga
&TipNota = 'NF-e' &Count = 0 For &sdtMDFeNotas in &sdtMDFe.Notas &Count += 1
&Varchar = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(&sdtMDFeNotas.chNFe) &MDfeChv = substr(&Varchar,1,4) + '.'+ substr(&Varchar,5,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,9,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,13,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,17,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,21,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,25,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,29,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,33,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,37,4) +'.'+ substr(&Varchar,41,4)
print Notas EndFor
&TipNota = 'CT-e' For &sdtMDFeCtes in &sdtMDFe.infCTe &Count += 1
&Varchar = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(&sdtMDFeCtes.chCTe) &MDfeChv = trim(&Varchar) print Notas EndFor
&TipNota = '' &MDfeChv = '' Do while &Count < 34 &Count += 1 print Notas EndDO
&UmaLInhaObs = gxGetMLi(&sdtMDFe.Adicionais, 1, 130) &DuasLinhaObs = gxGetMLi(&sdtMDFe.Adicionais, 2, 130) print observacoes
Footer print Rodape End
sub 'Emitente'
Do Case
// Case &FilNfeCab = '2' //LOGOMARCA // print Emitente // NoSkip // print logoMarca
Case &FilNfeCab = '3' //LOGO PARTE ESQUERDA print Emitente NoSkip print logoEsquerda
Case &FilNfeCab = '4' //LOGO PARTE SUPERIOR print Emitente NoSkip print logoSuperior
Otherwise print Emitente NoSkip print DadosFilial EndCase
EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Documento Auxiliar de Manifesto Eletrônico de Documentos Fiscais

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Informações dos Documentos Fiscais Vinculados ao Manifesto
